events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed: outriggers not fully extended invalidates the load chart in use, narrowing the crane's stability base and creating an unverified/likely overstated capacity — a critical tip-over hazard. Wrote a `fail` / `critical` risk determination with corrective actions (stop work, extend or re-rate for actual configuration, re-verify level/mat bearing, re-inspect) to `/app/answer.json`.
